milestone: Security patch · Forms page · Compliance · Lucide 1.x · TypeScript 6
description: Vite patched from ^8.0.1 to ^8.0.5 (3 CVE security fixes: path traversal, server.fs.deny bypass, WebSocket file read). Lucide-react jumped to major version 1.x (latest: 1.7.0); package.json range ^0.577.0 should be reviewed for v1 compatibility. TypeScript reached 6.0.2 (major); pinned at ~5.9.3 in package.json by design for stability. nodemailer updated to 8.0.5 (patch). Added Forms page with 4 exam form cards (CA DOI CE, DRE Final Exam Application, DRE Pre-License, RE 318A). DRE compliance updates: mandatory disclaimer, RE 307/318A/340 references, identity verification procedure, sponsor number placeholders. Payment: Zelle set as default, CC processing fee (3.5%) added as line item with dynamic total. Address updated to 120 S. Del Mar Ave Unit 1143 San Gabriel CA 91778. Irvine/Orange County placeholder added to Contact and PDF footer. Animated SVG favicon added with tab-hidden title cycling. Spotlight button effect added site-wide. Navigation spacing improved. Unsplash images replaced with local /public assets. Fixed broken CSS comment block in index.css. RE CE 45-Hour Package now shows exam form alert.
breaking_changes: lucide-react v1.x removed all brand icons and changed import paths for some icons — verify all icon imports if upgrading from ^0.577.0 to ^1.x
lucide_react_upgrade_note: v1.x is a major release — brand icons removed, API changes. Upgrade separately with testing.
typescript_upgrade_note: TypeScript 6 is a major release. Pinned at ~5.9.3 intentionally for stability. Upgrade requires testing.
